dict.string: Paparcar uses your location to detect when you park and to show free parking spots near you.
Paparcar needs background location to publish your spot when you leave, even if the app is closed.
Paparcar uses motion data to detect when you switch from walking to driving so it can offer your parking spot to others.
Paparcar uses Bluetooth to recognise when you connect to your car so it can detect parking events more reliably.
